response.justification: A seasoned full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience, strong software-craftsmanship habits (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), and genuine high-scale distributed-systems exposure (low-latency microservices handling millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic). However, the resume shows no direct experience with the core of this role: experimentation/feature-flagging platforms, telemetry and metrics infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis. Seniority signals (Senior/Staff IC, no clear org-wide multi-team influence) fall short of Principal/IC6 expectations, and the language stack only partially overlaps (no Python, limited C#/Java/C++ depth). Worth a screening conversation to probe data/experimentation aptitude, but not a clear fit on paper.
strengths: 13+ years across web, backend, mobile, embedded with proven high-throughput, low-latency distributed-systems work
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active community teaching/mentorship
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks)
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, feature-flagging, A/B testing, or rollout-risk platform experience (a core requirement)
Little evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical/experimental data analysis aptitude
Seniority and cross-team influence read as Senior/Staff IC, below Principal/IC6 scope; Python not listed
